description: How-to guidance for Estate features and settings — what it does, why it helps, how to access. Help & Discovery Intelligence™.

itemSchema.targetId: string — must exist in Estate Knowledge Base™

guides.whatItDoes: Settings hold your preferences — voice, accessibility, and how the Estate feels for you.
guides.whyHelpful: Small adjustments here can make every visit calmer and easier.
guides.howToAccess: You can open Settings from your profile, or just tell me what you'd like to change.

aliases: how do i change the voice
guides.whatItDoes: You can choose how Spark sounds when reading aloud — pace and voice live in Settings.
guides.whyHelpful: The right voice makes listening feel natural instead of tiring.

aliases: how do i set a reminder
guides.whatItDoes: Spark Reminders help you keep small things from taking up mental space — say what to remember and when.
guides.whyHelpful: You don't have to hold it in your head once it's captured.
guides.howToAccess: Just tell me what to remind you about — for example, "remind me to call Mom at 3." You can also find reminder options in Settings.

aliases: how does clear my mind work
how do i use clear my mind
guides.whatItDoes: Clear My Mind is continuous capture — set thoughts down without organizing or finishing anything.
guides.whyHelpful: Relief comes from unloading, not from filing everything away.
guides.howToAccess: Say "I need to clear my mind" or "let's brain dump" — I'll go with you.

aliases: how do i plan my day
guides.whatItDoes: Plan My Day is gentle morning orientation — one or two priorities without pressure.
guides.whyHelpful: Clarity about today reduces the weight of everything at once.
guides.howToAccess: Say "help me plan my day" when you're ready — we can do it in conversation.

aliases: how do i use peaceful places
guides.whatItDoes: Peaceful Places offers calm soundscapes — rain, woodland, piano — for focus or quiet company.
guides.whyHelpful: Gentle audio can make thinking feel less lonely.
guides.howToAccess: Say "I need peaceful places" or "play focus audio" — or visit the Music Room.

aliases: how do i see all the rooms
guides.whatItDoes: The folded map in the corner shows the Estate — places to explore when you're curious.
guides.whyHelpful: Orientation without memorizing names or menus.
guides.howToAccess: Tap the map in the corner, or say "show me the Estate."

guides.whatItDoes: The Discovery Key is a gentle invitation — one note about something worth knowing on the Estate.
guides.whyHelpful: Curiosity without notification pressure or a pile of tips.
guides.howToAccess: When you see the key in a room, tap it — or ask me what you might explore next.
